recommendations.title: While the City Sleeps
recommendations.overview: Newspaper men compete against each other to find a serial killer dubbed "The Lipstick Killer".

recommendations.title: The Plagues of Breslau
recommendations.overview: Every day at 6 pm a serial killer kills another person. Police officer Helena Rus thinks the killings are done by one man only and decides to reveal the killer's identity by getting back in 18th century history of the city.

recommendations.title: Wind River
recommendations.overview: An FBI agent teams with the town's veteran game tracker to investigate a murder that occurred on a Native American reservation.

recommendations.title: Te3n
recommendations.overview: A grandfather, police officer and a priest join hands to investigate and find a missing child.

recommendations.title: The Scent of the Night
recommendations.overview: A former policeman turns full-time robber and goes on a downward spiral of crime in 1970s Rome.

recommendations.title: Affliction
recommendations.overview: A small town policeman must investigate a suspicious hunting accident. The investigation and other events result in him slowly disintegrating mentally.
